title: OMR Ka Cyber Chor
subtitle: IT park ke andhere server room mein...
mystery: Ek badi IT company ka server hack ho gaya aur naya game code chori ho gaya. Access sirf rat ki shift wale do logo ke paas tha.

clues.name: Giri Hui Coffee
clues.description: Server rack ke paas filter coffee giri hai.

clues.name: Pendrive Cover
clues.description: Ek nayi pendrive ka cover mila dustbin mein.

characters.name: Vivek
characters.description: Coffee ka bahut shauqeen hai. Rival company mein interview diya tha.

dialogues.trigger: Tum server room mein kya kar rahe the?
dialogues.response: Main toh routine check ke liye gaya tha.
Haa, main coffee le gaya tha, par maine data copy nahi kiya!

characters.name: Anjali
characters.description: CCTV monitor dekhti hai, par aadhi raat ko so gai thi.

dialogues.trigger: CCTV mein kuch kyu nahi dikha?
dialogues.response: Camera 3 band tha... aur pantry ke dustbin mein maine ek pendrive ka cover dekha tha!

title: Fatehpur Sikri Ka Farzi
subtitle: Buland Darwaze ke saaye mein...
mystery: Ek videshi group ko fake tickets bechi gayi. Asli ticket counter wale ne kisi par shak jataya hai.

clues.name: Chota Printer
clues.description: Jhaadiyon ke peeche ek battery wala mini printer mila.

clues.name: Neeli Syaahi
clues.description: Fake tickets par ajeeb neeli syaahi lagi hai.

characters.name: Raju Guide
characters.description: Bina license ke foreigners ko ghumata hai. Hath mein neeli syaahi lagi hai.

dialogues.response: Arey nahi sahab, main toh sirf guide hoon!

dialogues.trigger: Tumhare hath pe ye neeli syaahi kaisi?
dialogues.response: Wo toh... pen leak ho gaya tha! Printer mera nahi hai!

characters.name: Ramesh
characters.description: Gusse mein hai ki uski naukri khatre mein hai.

dialogues.response: Raju aaj subah se jhaadiyon ke piche chhip-chhip kar kisi ko paper de raha tha.

title: Jallianwala Bagh Ki Yaad
mystery: Museum se 1919 ki ek purani bandook gayab ho gayi. Glass case toota hua tha aur ek safai karamchari chotil paya gaya.

clues.name: Kanch Ke Tukde
clues.description: Toote hue kanch mein uniform ka kapda phasa tha.

clues.name: Tooti Lathi
clues.description: Watchman ki lathi jo shayad kanch todne me use hui.

characters.name: Gurpreet
characters.description: Raat ko akela tha. Kehta hai chor ne uspe hamla kiya.

dialogues.response: Koi kaale kapdon mein tha, usne mujhe dhakka diya.
Dhakke se... maine lathi se case nahi toda!
Main andar aaya toh Gurpreet lathi se kuch tod raha tha, usne mujhe mara.

title: Golconda Ki Goonj
subtitle: Kile ki deewaron mein saazish...
mystery: Kile ke light and sound show ka aawaz ka system kharab kar diya gaya. Ek VIP aane wale the aur ye show bahut zaroori tha.

clues.name: Kaati Taar
clues.description: Speaker ki taar chaku se kaati gayi hai.

clues.name: Multitool Chaku
clues.description: Ek chota sa lal pocket knife.

characters.name: Tariq
characters.description: VIP se nafrat karta hai kyunki uske ghar tod diye gaye the.

dialogues.response: Pata nahi, kal raat theek the!
Haan par... maine show sabotage nahi kiya!

dialogues.trigger: Raat ko kiske paas chabhi thi?
dialogues.response: Tariq aakhri tha jo speakers check kar raha tha. Wo hamesha knife rakhta hai apne paas.

spots.name: Speakers 🔈
spots.description: Kile ke paas lage bade speakers.

spots.name: Control Desk 🎛️
spots.description: Jahan se show chalaya jata hai.

title: Sadar Bazaar Ka Zehar
subtitle: Pethe ki mithaas mein kadwahat...
mystery: Bazaar ki sabse badi pethe ki dukaan mein pethe ka ek batch kha kar log bimar pad gaye. Pata chala usme galti se safai wala chemical mil gaya tha.

clues.name: Khali Chemical Bottle
clues.description: Floor cleaner ki ek choti khali bottle gudam mein.

clues.name: Mitti Ke Nishan
clues.description: Gudam ki khidki se andar aane ke nishan.

characters.name: Lala Ji
characters.description: Samne wale ki dukaan band karwana chahte the.

dialogues.response: Main apni dukaan par hisaab kar raha tha.

dialogues.trigger: Khidki ke nishan aapke jooton jaise kyu hai?
dialogues.response: Main toh bas unka gudam dekhne gaya tha! Chemical maine nahi dala!

characters.name: Chhotu
characters.description: Dara hua hai ki ilzaam uspar aayega.

dialogues.response: Maine nahi! Maine dekha Lala ji raat ko hamari khidki ke paas theek jahan bottle mili wahan ghoom rahe the!

spots.name: Peeche Ki Khidki 🪟
spots.description: Gudam ke piche ek choti khidki.
